description: Composition Brown striped sweater made of 98% cotton and 2% lycra, has long sleeves, ribbed round neck, cuffs and hemline, velvet strip at inner back neck and small diamante logo on lower front Fit Regular Wash care Warm wash with light colours Do not use chlorine bleach Tumble dry Medium iron Keep warm with this sweater from arrow woman. Flattering horizontal stripes in warm Autumnal hues give a slimming effect and the neckline is wide enough to allow you to wear this sweater over a shirt making this a practical choice when the weather turns colder. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
